no-restricted-syntax.message: Inline styles are banned. Use Tailwind utilities or design tokens (rebuild non-negotiable: UI rules).
Deprecated naming: "Site Office" is banned in new code (rebuild non-negotiable: Naming hygiene).
alert() is banned in product code. Use a proper UI component.
confirm() is banned in product code. Use a proper UI component.
prompt() is banned in product code. Use a proper UI component.
